{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232011494694295A6581FED3046C"}"},"total":51},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7588557906036867864","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"路过的友友，看这里，别被一些呆瓜评论给整走了，评分低的基本上都是看了不满30分钟的，随便乱评的。啧，随便瞄一眼，就随手打低分 。[吃瓜]
这本书值得入股一看，真的沙雕，有趣 ，好看，又带了一点明末意难平历史的厚重。
前几章会有点慢节奏，但后期是真的顶，越看越好看。
哈基咪，芙蓉王，章鱼哥 这些后面出现的人物太精彩了，乞活军阵营，嚯嚯士绅，尽显毫无底线的第四天灾特性。还有章鱼哥二五仔卧底，混入官军，真的要笑死我了。
还有穿着圣斗士铠甲，炎龙铠甲等等一系爆帅战甲的乞活军玩家在战场上托马斯回旋，神挡杀神。[你细品]，笑的我肚子疼。
赤血军走的是又红又强 的仁义之师路线（毕竟作为后方老巢要发展生产力，肯定要仁义的），扩展出的乞活军就是沙雕，为所欲为第四天灾路线， 还有二五仔章鱼哥，骚操作不断 ，让老洪分分钟怀疑人生。
反正喜欢各种口味的 ，都能在这篇文里找到适合自己的点。","text_exts":[{"e":181,"s":177,"text":"第四天灾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774267909FED3046C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227588557906036867864%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227524286565569285182%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":216,"s":213,"text":"圣斗士","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9C%A3%E6%96%97%E5%A3%AB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774267909FED3046C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227588557906036867864%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227524286565569285182%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9C%A3%E6%96%97%E5%A3%AB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766850948,"group_id":"7524286565569285182","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+HzlbbUtcVXTG2Qxr/Db+U=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"99764579506","user_name":"嫡长书粉占沙发"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"99764579506","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7524286565569285182","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到一个和明末似是而非的异世界，关外建奴女真
